summary: Completed testing of Email mode feature for iMos app. All 6 requested features verified. Found and fixed bug in 3 pages (toggle-style, email-campaigns, email-templates) where pages stuck in loading state due to useEffect not having user._id dependency.

inbox_sms_email_toggle.description: SMS/Email pill toggle visible in inbox header. Clicking Email switches to light mode theme.

email_mode_banner.description: Clicking Email shows 'Email Mode - Sending branded HTML emails' banner and title changes to 'Email'

sms_campaigns_menu.description: 'SMS Campaigns' menu item exists in More page with 'Automated SMS follow-ups' subtitle

email_campaigns_menu.description: 'Email Campaigns' menu item exists in More page with 'Automated email follow-ups' subtitle

email_templates_menu.description: 'Email Templates' menu item exists with 'Create and manage email templates' subtitle. Page shows 5 default templates.

toggle_style_settings.description: 'SMS / Email Toggle' menu item exists. Settings page shows all 4 toggle styles (pill, fab, tabs, segmented)

backend_email_templates.description: /api/email/templates endpoint returns 5 default templates (Welcome Email, Digital Business Card, Review Request, Photo Share, Follow Up)

bugs_fixed.issue: Page stuck in infinite loading state
bugs_fixed.cause: useEffect had empty dependency array [] and loadPreferences() returned early without setting loading=false when user._id was undefined
bugs_fixed.fix: Added user?._id to dependency array and added setLoading(false) when user._id is not available

bugs_fixed.issue: Page stuck in infinite loading state
bugs_fixed.cause: Same pattern - useEffect empty dependency array and early return without setLoading(false)
bugs_fixed.fix: Added user?._id to dependency array and added setLoading(false) when user._id is not available

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email mode feature fully working. Inbox has SMS/Email toggle in header, clicking Email switches to light mode with blue banner. All 4 toggle styles available in settings (pill is default). Backend has default email templates seeded on first access. Resend email integration is MOCKED - requires RESEND_API_KEY to be configured.

mocked_apis.resend_email_sending: Requires RESEND_API_KEY environment variable - currently not configured
